panels.imagePrompt: A modern open-plan office on a Tuesday morning, fluorescent lights, employees at their desks typing, coffee cups scattered around, mundane corporate atmosphere, wide angle shot

caption.text: Tout commence dans un bureau ordinaire, un mardi matin comme les autres...

panels.imagePrompt: Two colleagues looking at a computer screen showing shocking data graphs, one standing one sitting, dramatic office lighting, expressions of disbelief

caption.text: Mais rien ne se passe comme prévu.

panels.imagePrompt: A man alone at his desk, hand on chin, deep in thought, dark shadows, single desk lamp illuminating his worried face
A woman standing up from her chair decisively, pointing at a whiteboard covered in plans, determined expression, dynamic pose, conference room
A team huddled around a table covered in documents and laptops, late at night, city skyline visible through office windows, focused teamwork
Close-up of hands typing furiously on a keyboard, multiple terminal windows with code on the screen, green text on black background, tense atmosphere
Sunrise over a city skyline, golden light flooding through office windows, a single figure silhouetted against the dawn, sense of achievement and new beginning

caption.text: Et c'est ainsi que tout a changé.
